data.name: Furry Empire ⚔️
data.detailed_description:
Furry Empire is a match-three adventure blended with visual novel storytelling, where you ⚔️ battle enemies, ⬆️ upgrade your abilities, and 💕 build romantic relationships with sexy furry girls!

You take on the role of a young emperor 👑 who has just received this title. Unfortunately, he doesn't have much time to enjoy it - the Demon King is gathering forces to destroy the world, so our hero needs a bigger army 🛡, more resources 💰 and more power ⚡️.

To get everything he needs, our hero must defeat the four "Queens of the North" to get their armies and resources. And that's where our story begins! ✨📖

Ember, the Sword of Wildfire 🔥 - a powerful warrior who likes nothing but drinking, fighting and eating. She will crush you before you can make your first move!

Lapis, Lady of Magic 🟪 - a shy beauty of the dragon race who, like you, has only recently gained her position. Despite her inexperience in all things social, she is one of the most powerful mages today!

Eyre, the Master of All Winds 💨 - a cunning and playful archer. No one can catch her or keep up with her speed, but she never runs and always plays with her opponents before killing them.

Icelyn, the Cold Wisdom ❄️ - a true leader of her nation, the wisest person in the whole empire. Like her powers, her character is very cold, you'd be lucky to see her smile. If you try to approach her without permission - your body will be immediately imprisoned in ice.

The Queens of the North are eager to test your strength ⚔️ (and perhaps your charm 😉). Prove yourself in battle three times, and they will surrender their armies 🛡, their kingdoms 🏰, and themselves to your rule 👑. So what are you waiting for? ✨

data.short_description: The young and mighty Emperor needs power for the upcoming war against the evil forces. To get that power, he must conquer four powerful queens - both their lands and their hearts.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 烏克蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB RAM
